transmission: The Bio-Feedback Monitor: Psychological Momentum Unlocked.
details: Engineered the Psychological Momentum Engine to dynamically calculate your Cognitive Sync Score.
Introduced Dynamic Aura Styling that visually shifts the app's aesthetic between 'Flow' and 'Clouded' based on your momentum.
Redesigned the Commander Profile with pulsing telemetry, hover micro-copy, and exact Resonance tracking.
Integrated Web Audio API for seamless, ambient bio-feedback loops reflecting your current cognitive state.
Secured Google Account authorization integration for robust user identity verification.
Engineered the Stellar Sync Engine via Vercel Blob with binary payload compression for cross-device telemetry.
Introduced Temporal Divergence resolution (CRDT-style UI) to flawlessly merge data between devices.
Upgraded Linked Devices Array UI for real-time monitoring of all active devices in the current session.

transmission: Stasis Protocol: Backlog Integrity & UX Refinement.
details: Secured the Stasis Backlog: Unresolved tasks now strictly remain in stasis instead of auto-drifting into the daily mission.
Re-engineered terminology: Simplified 'Query Plan (Unresolved Parameters)' to 'Stasis Backlog' for immediate cognitive clarity.
Enhanced trajectory drift reflections to accurately record unresolved stasis items.
Migrated global synchronization infrastructure from Google Drive to ultra-fast Vercel Blob architecture.
Implemented seamless remote update lifecycle with real-time network-aware broadcast banners.
Introduced Secure Paywall Gateway for robust monetization tiers (UPI/UTR support).

transmission: Legacy Device Catalyst: Memory Efficiency & Volatile Fallbacks.
details: Implemented 'Emergency Volatile Mode' (memory://) fallback for devices with strictly locked or memory-starved storage environments.
Refactored trajectory bulk imports into chunked atomic transactions to prevent 32-bit WASM stack overflows on older hardware.
Optimized schema initialization with granular execution blocks to resolve Emscripten 'aborted()' errors on legacy mobile browsers.
Enhanced PWA caching logic for faster cold-starts on high-latency mobile networks.
Implemented OPFS lock fallback to IndexedDB when NoModificationAllowedError is detected.
Added beforeunload listener to release OPFS handles and prevent lock contention.
Fixed worker thread termination races during rapid navigation.
Stabilized flaky Vitest database tests with unique memory path isolation.
Updated PWA configuration to precache critical .wasm and .data assets for total offline autonomy.
Increased global test timeouts for heavy structural migrations.
Fixed critical PGlite initialization failures on browsers with restricted file handle pools.
Implemented automatic storage fallback to IndexedDB when OPFS Access Handle Pool is exhausted.
Added 'Neural Link Establishing' splash screen for smoother initial boot.
Optimized store synchronization for prioritized interactive state loading.

transmission: System Architecture Shift: Worker-Thread Concurrency & Mobile Optimization.
details: Migrated core database operations to dedicated Web Worker threads for non-blocking UI interactions.
Achieved seamless, high-performance offline capability optimized for mobile devices.
Improved reliability and responsiveness via Comlink cross-thread communication.
Enhanced mobile UX with reduced main-thread load.

transmission: System Jump: Neural Link Recovery & Temporal Purge Protocol.
details: Implemented 'Temporal Purge' protocol to resolve unrecoverable database states (Errno 44).
Enhanced diagnostic UI for critical boot failures with detailed error mapping.
Optimized PGlite connection handling for improved stability across browser sessions.
Added proactive recovery suggestions for ENOTEMPTY storage conflicts.

transmission: System Leap Hotfix: JSON Import Stability and Version Alignment.
details: Fixes JSON import stability issues in Momentum Engine.
Aligns system version across all core modules.
Optimized database initialization sequence.

transmission: The Nebula Protocol: Distributed Database & UX Overhaul.
details: Migration to PGlite (IndexedDB) for local-first persistence.
New Nebula Map interface for milestone visualization.
Enhanced Sound Engine with space-thematic feedback.
Improved Command Hub with quick-access protocols.
